n: Chapter 10.4: The Disaster of the Gladden Fields

steps.t: Gandalf asked to meet you on the road north of Duskenvale, near the Gladden Fields.
Gandalf desires to walk east along the road into Laerlad, where he will speak further on the subject of Isildur's journey north from Gondor.
Gandalf has called a halt along the wooded road in Laerlad.

Gandalf has called a halt along the wooded road in Laerlad.
Gandalf desires to walk north along the road beside the Gladden Fields, where he will speak further on the subject of Isildur's journey north from Gon…
Gandalf has called a halt beside the road by the Gladden Fields.
Gandalf has called a halt beside the road by the Gladden Fields. He asked you to <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> at the surrounding countryside an…
Gandalf has called a halt beside the road alongside the Gladden Fields.
Gandalf desires to meet you down the slope along the river-bank, further to the north-west.
Gandalf has called a halt along the river-bank in the Gladden Fields.
Gandalf has called a halt alongside the river-bank. He asked you to <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> around you as Isildur must have done when he k…
Gandalf has called a halt alongside the river-bank.
